title: Admin Dashboards for Crypto Digital Stores: Everything You Need to Get Started — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, struggling to collect payments due to PayPal restrictions or banking limitations? You're not alone. Many countries face similar challenges. This post walks you through setting up a complete admin dashboard for your crypto digital store, without relying on PayPal or other blocked platforms. Follow along and learn how to bypass these restrictions, set up a seamless payment and delivery pipeline, and start selling your digital products in just a few days.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Conventional payment platforms often impose restrictions on countries with high-risk profiles or limited banking infrastructure. This leaves many creators without a reliable way to collect payments. However, by using a custom-built admin dashboard, you can bypass these restrictions and connect directly with your buyers using cryptocurrency. This method allows you to maintain full control over your store and provides a seamless experience for your customers.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your admin dashboard, you'll need a few key tools. Start by installing the Core Shop Engine, a robust backend solution that handles payment verification, PDF receipts, and automated delivery. Next, integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, which enables multi-chain QR code generation, live price feeds, and support for over 300 cryptocurrencies. Finally, access the Admin Dashboard to manage transactions, orders, and analytics in real-time.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

GitHub Pages is the hosting infrastructure for your entire store. It is free, reliable, scales to any traffic level, and requires no server management. Your store files — the HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and any static assets — live in a GitHub repository. GitHub Pages serves them as a static website at a URL like yourusername.github.io/yourstore. There are no monthly costs, no capacity limits for a static site, and no server that can go down and take your store offline. The deployment process involves pushing your configured store files to the repository — a process that takes under five minutes once your files are ready. Updates to your store, including adding new products, are as simple as updating the relevant files and pushing to the repository.
Don't let PayPal restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and start selling your digital products. Begin by deploying your admin dashboard to a hosting platform like GitHub Pages, and then configure your shop to use the NOWPayments payment processor. Finally, create a test product and make a sale to ensure that everything is working as expected.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows, your admin dashboard will help you manage increasing demand and sales. Use the real-time analytics provided by the Admin Dashboard to monitor your store's performance, identify areas for improvement, and make data-driven decisions to optimize your sales strategy. With a reliable admin dashboard, you'll be able to scale your store with confidence and focus on creating more valuable digital products for your customers.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments? To build a digital store that accepts crypto payments, you'll need to integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments and a frontend solution like Web3 Wallet Connect. This will enable your customers to pay in over 300 cryptocurrencies and receive their digital products instantly.
A custom-built admin dashboard is the key to bypassing conventional payment platform restrictions.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're just starting out, consider using a static site generator like GitHub Pages to host your digital store. You can then integrate your payment processor and frontend solution to start accepting crypto payments. For example, you can use the NOWPayments payment processor and the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend to create a seamless payment experience for your customers. Check out our Shop demo at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see this setup in action.
Your Action Checklist

To set up a complete admin dashboard for your crypto digital store, follow these concrete steps: 1) install the Core Shop Engine and configure your payment processor; 2) integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend and set up automated delivery; 3) deploy your admin dashboard to a hosting platform like GitHub Pages; 4) configure your shop to use the NOWPayments payment processor; 5) create a test product and make a sale to ensure everything is working as expected.
With the right tools, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers and start selling your digital products in just a few days.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
